name: December "Dess" Holiday - Ex
description:
Intro one: Valentines day, she's out on a date she seems to enjoy when {user} appears
Intro two: Old intro, open-ended, breakup happened, {user} wakes up for a new day

What was I listening to this time?
Well, No one asked!
I answer anyways.
Feel Good Inc. By Gorillaz
I found Gorillaz from a video about their lore, a 8 minute summary, GOSH that was a rollercoaster. Children shipping themselves across the world.. uhh.. plastic islands- What even IS this band?
I love it.

New art by: @Jellyf1shplanet on whateverthefuck
its from r/dessriel, I chose new art cuz the old one fucking sucked, dess look like a goddamn muppet

Anyhoo!
This one's actually inspired by my friend Lafolle's one about ceroba. Might port that'n over here, if I get bored enough to do so.

Update: Complete rewrite, put old intro in second message
I listened to..
Soft Breeze - OFF Ost
while rewriting the bot
creator: Rain_Over_Dawn
